metadata.title: Dashboard Integration - Types, Validation, and Database

implementation_phase.objective: Update the E2E Test Dashboard to receive, validate, and store the ai_context field from the dashboard reporter. This enables queryable failure analysis and AI-powered troubleshooting from the dashboard.

step.title: Add AIContext Type Definition
step.code: // Add this interface for AI failure context export interface AIFailureContext { test_id: string timestamp: string file: string suite: string[] test: string error: { message: string type: string location: string } steps: string[] last_step: string duration_ms: number retries: number last_api?: { method: string url: string status: number operation?: string } page_url?: string browser?: string logs?: Array<{ timestamp: number level: string source: string message: string data?: Record<string, unknown> }> execution?: { run_id: string branch: string commit_sha: string } }

step.title: Update TestResult Interface
step.code: // Add ai_context field to TestResult interface export interface TestResult { id: number execution_id: number test_name: string test_file: string test_signature?: string status: 'passed' | 'failed' | 'skipped' | 'timedout' duration_ms: number is_critical?: boolean is_flaky?: boolean error_message?: string stack_trace?: string browser?: string retry_count?: number logs?: LogEntry[] ai_context?: AIFailureContext // ADD THIS LINE started_at?: string completed_at?: string created_at: string artifacts?: TestArtifact[] }

step.title: Update TestResultRequest Interface
step.code: // Add ai_context to request interface (for incoming API data) export interface TestResultRequest { test_name: string test_file: string status: 'passed' | 'failed' | 'skipped' | 'timedout' duration_ms: number is_critical?: boolean error_message?: string stack_trace?: string browser?: string retry_count?: number logs?: LogEntry[] ai_context?: AIFailureContext // ADD THIS LINE started_at?: string completed_at?: string }

step.title: Add Zod Validation Schema for AIContext
Update testResultSchema to Include ai_context
step.code: // Update testResultSchema to include ai_context export const testResultSchema = z.object({ test_name: z.string().min(1), test_file: z.string().min(1), status: z.enum(['passed', 'failed', 'skipped', 'timedout']), duration_ms: z.number().int().min(0), is_critical: z.boolean().optional(), error_message: z.string().optional(), stack_trace: z.string().optional(), browser: z.string().optional(), retry_count: z.number().int().min(0).optional(), logs: z.array(logEntrySchema).optional(), ai_context: aiContextSchema, // ADD THIS LINE started_at: z.string().datetime().optional(), completed_at: z.string().datetime().optional() })

step.title: Update insertTestResults Function
Update getTestResultsByExecutionId to Return ai_context
Add Query Function for AI Context Analysis

testing.test_api: # Test the API endpoint with ai_context curl -X POST https://your-dashboard.vercel.app/api/test-results \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -H "X-API-Key: your-api-key" \ -d '{ "execution": { "run_id": "test-123", "branch": "test-branch", "commit_sha": "abc123", "status": "failure", "total_tests": 1, "passed": 0, "failed": 1, "skipped": 0, "started_at": "2024-01-15T14:30:00Z" }, "results": [{ "test_name": "test with ai context", "test_file": "test.spec.ts", "status": "failed", "duration_ms": 5000, "error_message": "Timeout exceeded", "ai_context": { "test_id": "test.spec.ts::test with ai context", "timestamp": "2024-01-15T14:30:05Z", "file": "test.spec.ts", "suite": ["test"], "test": "test with ai context", "error": { "message": "Timeout exceeded", "type": "TimeoutError", "location": "test.spec.ts:10:5" }, "steps": ["Navigate", "Click"], "last_step": "Click", "duration_ms": 5000, "retries": 0 } }], "artifacts": [] }'
testing.verify_database: -- Verify ai_context was stored SELECT test_name, ai_context->'error'->>'type' as error_type, ai_context->'error'->>'message' as error_message FROM test_results WHERE ai_context IS NOT NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5;
testing.verify_queries:
-- Test getFailuresWithAIContext equivalent SELECT * FROM test_results WHERE ai_context IS NOT NULL AND ai_context->'error'->>'type' = 'TimeoutError' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10;
-- Test getErrorTypeDistribution equivalent SELECT ai_context->'error'->>'type' as error_type, COUNT(*) FROM test_results WHERE ai_context IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ai_context->'error'->>'type' ORDER BY count DESC;

success_criteria.criterion: API accepts requests with ai_context field
ai_context stored as JSONB in database
Zod validation passes for valid ai_context
Query functions return ai_context in results
Existing requests without ai_context still work

implementation_phase.next_phase: Proceed to Phase 4 to roll out logging to all test files that currently lack structured logging.
